name: Authentication
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This section illustrates a complete example scenario of how data is structured and ingested when using the Multimarket Push API from Maropost Merchandising Cloud (formerly Findify). It defines market setups, product catalog data, translations, pricing, availability, and warehouse configurations - giving developers a full context for building and validating test cases."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Base URL", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"bold": true, "text": "POST "}, {"type": "a", "url": to enable Push API and Multimarket functionality for your account."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "API Authentication"}]}, {"type": "p",
